canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>signal decay</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #0a0a0a; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  cursor: crosshair;
}
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let width, height;
let mouseX = 0, mouseY = 0;
let targetCorruption = 0.3;
let corruption = 0.3;
let time = 0;
let frameBuffer = null;
let lastFrame = null;

function resize() {
  width = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  height = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  frameBuffer = ctx.createImageData(width, height);
  lastFrame = new Uint8ClampedArray(width * height * 4);
}

window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
resize();

// Track mouse for corruption intensity
document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
  // Closer to center = more stable, edges = more corrupt
  const dx = (mouseX - width/2) / (width/2);
  const dy = (mouseY - height/2) / (height/2);
  targetCorruption = 0.15 + Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy) * 0.6;
});

document.addEventListener('click', () => {
  // Spike corruption on click
  corruption = 1.0;
});

// Generate base pattern - geometric grid that gets corrupted
function generateBasePattern(t) {
  const data = frameBuffer.data;
  const cellSize = 40;
  
  for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
      const i = (y * width + x) * 4;
      
      // Create underlying geometric pattern
      const gx = Math.floor(x / cellSize);
      const gy = Math.floor(y / cellSize);
      const cellX = x % cellSize;
      const cellY = y % cellSize;
      
      // Diagonal lines pattern
      const diag1 = (x + y + t * 20) % 80 < 3;
      const diag2 = (x - y + t * 15 + 1000) % 60 < 2;
      
      // Grid intersections
      const gridX = cellX < 2 || cellX > cellSize - 3;
      const gridY = cellY < 2 || cellY > cellSize - 3;
      const isGrid = gridX || gridY;
      
      // Pulsing circles at intersections
      const cx = gx * cellSize + cellSize/2;
      const cy = gy * cellSize + cellSize/2;
      const dist = Math.sqrt((x-cx)**2 + (y-cy)**2);
      const pulse = Math.sin(t * 2 + gx * 0.5 + gy * 0.3) * 0.5 + 0.5;
      const circle = dist < 8 + pulse * 6 && dist > 4 + pulse * 3;
      
      // Horizontal scan bars
      const scanbar = Math.sin(y * 0.1 + t * 3) > 0.95;
      
      // Base colors
      let r = 10, g = 8, b = 15;
      
      if (isGrid) {
        r = 30; g = 20; b = 50;
      }
      if (diag1) {
        r = 255; g = 50; b = 150; // hot pink
      }
      if (diag2) {
        r = 50; g = 220; b = 255; // cyan
      }
      if (circle) {
        r = 200; g = 80; b = 220; // purple
      }
      if (scanbar) {
        r = Math.min(255, r + 40);
        g = Math.min(255, g + 30);
        b = Math.min(255, b + 50);
      }
      
      data[i] = r;
      data[i+1] = g;
      data[i+2] = b;
      data[i+3] = 255;
    }
  }
}

// Apply VHS-style corruption
function applyCorruption(t, amount) {
  const data = frameBuffer.data;
  
  // Tracking lines - horizontal displacement
  const numTrackingLines = Math.floor(amount * 8);
  for (let i = 0; i < numTrackingLines; i++) {
    const lineY = Math.floor((Math.sin(t * 0.7 + i * 2.5) * 0.5 + 0.5) * height);
    const lineHeight = 2 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 15 * amount);
    const offset = Math.floor((Math.sin(t * 3 + i) * 30 + Math.random() * 20) * amount);
    
    for (let y = lineY; y < Math.min(lineY + lineHeight, height); y++) {
      for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
        const srcX = (x + offset + width) % width;
        const srcI = (y * width + srcX) * 4;
        const dstI = (y * width + x) * 4;
        
        // Copy with slight color shift
        if (srcI < data.length - 4 && dstI < data.length - 4) {
          const temp = [data[srcI], data[srcI+1], data[srcI+2]];
          data[dstI] = temp[0];
          data[dstI+1] = temp[1];
          data[dstI+2] = temp[2];
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Chromatic aberration - RGB channel separation
  const aberration = Math.floor(amount * 12);
  if (aberration > 0) {
    const tempData = new Uint8ClampedArray(data);
    for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
      for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
        const i = (y * width + x) * 4;
        // Red channel shifts left
        const rSrcX = Math.min(width - 1, x + aberration);
        const rSrcI = (y * width + rSrcX) * 4;
        // Blue channel shifts right  
        const bSrcX = Math.max(0, x - aberration);
        const bSrcI = (y * width + bSrcX) * 4;
        
        data[i] = tempData[rSrcI];     // Red from right
        data[i+2] = tempData[bSrcI+2]; // Blue from left
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Block corruption - random displaced rectangles
  const numBlocks = Math.floor(amount * 6);
  for (let i = 0; i < numBlocks; i++) {
    if (Math.random() > 0.7) {
      const bx = Math.floor(Math.random() * width);
      const by = Math.floor(Math.random() * height);
      const bw = 20 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 100 * amount);
      const bh = 5 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 30 * amount);
      const offsetX = Math.floor((Math.random() - 0.5) * 50 * amount);
      const offsetY = Math.floor((Math.random() - 0.5) * 20 * amount);
      
      for (let y = by; y < Math.min(by + bh, height); y++) {
        for (let x = bx; x < Math.min(bx + bw, width); x++) {
          const srcX = (x + offsetX + width) % width;
          const srcY = (y + offsetY + height) % height;
          const srcI = (srcY * width + srcX) * 4;
          const dstI = (y * width + x) * 4;
          
          data[dstI] = data[srcI];
          data[dstI+1] = data[srcI+1];
          data[dstI+2] = data[srcI+2];
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Static noise bursts
  if (Math.random() < amount * 0.3) {
    const burstY = Math.floor(Math.random() * height);
    const burstH = 5 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 50 * amount);
    for (let y = burstY; y < Math.min(burstY + burstH, height); y++) {
      for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
        if (Math.random() < 0.4 * amount) {
          const i = (y * width + x) * 4;
          const noise = Math.random() * 255;
          data[i] = noise;
          data[i+1] = noise;
          data[i+2] = noise;
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Scanlines
  for (let y = 0; y < height; y += 3) {
    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
      const i = (y * width + x) * 4;
      data[i] = Math.floor(data[i] * 0.85);
      data[i+1] = Math.floor(data[i+1] * 0.85);
      data[i+2] = Math.floor(data[i+2] * 0.85);
    }
  }
  
  // Vertical sync wobble on edges
  if (amount > 0.5) {
    const wobbleStrength = (amount - 0.5) * 40;
    for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
      const wobble = Math.sin(y * 0.05 + t * 5) * wobbleStrength;
      if (Math.abs(wobble) > 2) {
        for (let x = 0; x < Math.min(Math.abs(wobble), 30); x++) {
          const i = (y * width + x) * 4;
          const i2 = (y * width + (width - 1 - x)) * 4;
          // Black bars on edges during bad sync
          data[i] = data[i+1] = data[i+2] = 0;
          data[i2] = data[i2+1] = data[i2+2] = 0;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

// Add phosphor glow / bloom effect
function addGlow(amount) {
  const data = frameBuffer.data;
  const glowRadius = 2;
  const tempData = new Uint8ClampedArray(data);
  
  for (let y = glowRadius; y < height - glowRadius; y += 2) {
    for (let x = glowRadius; x < width - glowRadius; x += 2) {
      const i = (y * width + x) * 4;
      
      // Simple box blur for bright pixels only
      if (tempData[i] > 150 || tempData[i+1] > 150 || tempData[i+2] > 150) {
        for (let dy = -glowRadius; dy <= glowRadius; dy++) {
          for (let dx = -glowRadius; dx <= glowRadius; dx++) {
            const ni = ((y + dy) * width + (x + dx)) * 4;
            const falloff = 0.15 / (Math.abs(dx) + Math.abs(dy) + 1);
            data[ni] = Math.min(255, data[ni] + tempData[i] * falloff);
            data[ni+1] = Math.min(255, data[ni+1] + tempData[i+1] * falloff);
            data[ni+2] = Math.min(255, data[ni+2] + tempData[i+2] * falloff);
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

// Frame blend for motion blur / phosphor persistence
function blendWithLastFrame(persistence) {
  const data = frameBuffer.data;
  for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i += 4) {
    data[i] = data[i] * (1 - persistence) + lastFrame[i] * persistence;
    data[i+1] = data[i+1] * (1 - persistence) + lastFrame[i+1] * persistence;
    data[i+2] = data[i+2] * (1 - persistence) + lastFrame[i+2] * persistence;
  }
  lastFrame.set(data);
}

function draw() {
  time += 0.016;
  
  // Smooth corruption transitions
  corruption += (targetCorruption - corruption) * 0.05;
  
  // Occasional glitch spikes
  if (Math.random() < 0.005) {
    corruption = Math.min(1, corruption + 0.3);
  }
  
  // Generate base pattern
  generateBasePattern(time);
  
  // Apply corruption effects
  applyCorruption(time, corruption);
  
  // Add glow
  addGlow(corruption);
  
  // Phosphor persistence
  blendWithLastFrame(0.2);
  
  // Draw to canvas
  ctx.putImageData(frameBuffer, 0, 0);
  
  // Vignette overlay
  const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
    width/2, height/2, 0,
    width/2, height/2, Math.max(width, height) * 0.7
  );
  gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
  gradient.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(0,0,0,0.1)');
  gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0.6)');
  ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
  
  // CRT curvature simulation - subtle barrel distortion text
  ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(0, 255, 200, ${0.03 + corruption * 0.05})`;
  ctx.font = '10px monospace';
  ctx.fillText(`SIGNAL: ${Math.floor((1 - corruption) * 100)}%`, 20, height - 20);
  ctx.fillText(`TRACK: ${corruption > 0.5 ? 'UNSTABLE' : 'OK'}`, 20, height - 35);
  
  requestAnimationFrame(draw);
}

draw();
</script>
</body>
</html>
